texto: The silence lingers and we soak it up like a good steam. Men like silence. We believe in it. We crave it. To us, silence is equal to peace and synonymous with quiet. Thus the common gender-specific phrase uttered by men in homes throughout the world, usually in the evening and on weekends: “Can I please get some peace and quiet, please?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alan Eisenstock: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “The silence lingers and we soak it up like a good steam. Men like silence. We believe in it. We c…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, gender, manspeak pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e termino.

frase_original: The silence lingers and we soak it up like a good steam. Men like silence. We believe in it. We crave it. To us, silence is equal to peace and synonymous with quiet. Thus the common gender-specific phrase uttered by men in homes throughout the world, usually in the evening and on weekends: “Can I please get some peace and quiet, please?

texto: ...And Brick and I say in unison, “As long as I’m here.”This is a guy thing.You never want to acknowledge that you and another guy had exactly the same thought in exactly the same words and that you spoke them aloud . . .at exactly the same time. If you’re out on a date and this happens, this is a good thing. It’s evidence that you and your date think alike, you’re in sync, possibly even soul mates, and with some luck, you might get laid. When this occurs with two guys, it’s simply freaky and should go by as if it never happened.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alan Eisenstock: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “...And Brick and I say in unison, “As long as I’m here.”This is a guy thing.You never want to ack…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, gender, manspeak pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e manspeak.

frase_original: ...And Brick and I say in unison, “As long as I’m here.”This is a guy thing.You never want to acknowledge that you and another guy had exactly the same thought in exactly the same words and that you spoke them aloud . . .at exactly the same time. If you’re out on a date and this happens, this is a good thing. It’s evidence that you and your date think alike, you’re in sync, possibly even soul mates, and with some luck, you might get laid. When this occurs with two guys, it’s simply freaky and should go by as if it never happened.

texto: …I am certain of this one truth: men can achieve closeness without intimacy, while women can achieve intimacy without closeness.For example, Bobbie knows every intimate detail of her dental hygienist’s private life. She doesn’t have a close relationship with her, but she knows more about the woman who cleans her teeth twice a year than I do about most of the guys I play basketball with every week. And still I feel a closeness with every one of them. Maybe it’s because I don’t know too much.
explicacao: Citação de Alan Eisenstock sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “…I am certain of this one truth: men can achieve closeness without intimacy, while women can achi…” articula reflexao, gender, manspeak em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e estudos.
